scripts.build:dist: pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsdown --config tsdown.config.ts --entry modules/cli/src/index.ts --out-dir modules/cli/dist && cp ../api/src/schema.sql dist/schema.sql
scripts.build: pnpm run build:dist && pnpm run test:type && pnpm run test:lint && pnpm run test:vitest && pnpm run test:smoke && pnpm run test:pack
scripts.test:lint: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm --dir ../.. exec biome check modules/cli/package.json modules/cli/bin modules/cli/src modules/cli/test
scripts.test:vitest: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project cli
scripts.test:pack: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project cli --testNamePattern "packaged global install"
scripts.test:smoke: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || node --input-type=module --eval "import {createServer} from 'node:http'; import {once} from 'node:events'; import {spawn} from 'node:child_process'; const server = createServer((request, response) => { if (request.url === '/health') { response.writeHead(200, {'content-type': 'application/json'}); response.end(JSON.stringify({status: 'ok'})); return; } if (request.url === '/tasks') { response.writeHead(200, {'content-type': 'application/json'}); response.end(JSON.stringify({items: []})); return; } response.writeHead(404, {'content-type': 'application/json'}); response.end(JSON.stringify({code: 'UNAVAILABLE', message: 'not found'})); }); const runCli = async (args) => { const child = spawn(process.execPath, ['./bin/aim.js', ...args], {cwd: process.cwd(), stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'pipe']}); const stdout = []; const stderr = []; child.stdout.on('data', (chunk) => stdout.push(Buffer.from(chunk))); child.stderr.on('data', (chunk) => stderr.push(Buffer.from(chunk))); const [code] = await once(child, 'close'); const stdoutText = Buffer.concat(stdout).toString('utf8'); const stderrText = Buffer.concat(stderr).toString('utf8'); if (code !== 0) throw new Error('expected zero exit code for ' + args.join(' ')); if (stderrText !== '') throw new Error('expected empty stderr for ' + args.join(' ')); JSON.parse(stdoutText); }; server.listen(0, '127.0.0.1'); await once(server, 'listening'); const address = server.address(); if (!address || typeof address === 'string') throw new Error('expected tcp server address'); const baseUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:' + address.port; await runCli(['health', '--base-url', baseUrl]); await runCli(['task', 'list', '--base-url', baseUrl]); server.close(); await once(server, 'close');"
